content:
# Entity: Shady Oaks Corporate Chain

**Structure:** Alden Global Capital (NY, $275M portfolio) → Homes of America LLC (DE) → Shady Oaks Park MHP LLC (NJ, DISSOLVED since 2022) + Cricklewood MHP LLC + VRM Capital + Partridge Equity Group
**Lane:** B (Housing)
**Case:** 2025-002760-CZ
**Damages Range:** $2.6M–$17.6M (includes RICO treble)
**Filings Against:** 22-Count Housing Mega-Complaint (90/100), Federal Housing FHA+RICO (82/100), LARA (80/100), HUD (80/100)
**Key Evidence:** 3 irreconcilable ledger versions, $6,085.99 omitted payments, 74% tax undervaluation ($1.036M gap), dissolved entity filing lawsuits, North Morris Estates criminal conviction, coerced lease ($325→$695), EGLE sewage violations (VN-017235)
**Defendants:** 8 total — Shady Oaks MHP LLC, Homes of America LLC, Alden Global Capital, Partridge Equity Group, VRM Capital, Cricklewood MHP LLC, Casey VanDam, Nicole Browley, Kim Davis
**Discovery:** 25 interrogatories, 32 RFP categories to all 8 defendants
